creator: tijl@FreeBSD.org
text: cups-genppd is not part of cups, it's part of gutenprint and gutenprint probably does not support HP printers.  These days normally you don't need to worry about PPD files.  Just install the right driver (if you have an HP printer try the official HP driver in print/hplip), go to https://localhost:631 and add your printer.  You only need to select the printer model.  You don't need a PPD file.
